p.text:
Good — I have the full transcript. Now I'll identify all features and fire parallel `match_tickets` calls for each.

**Features identified:**
1. Creating food items (item card, food/non-food, fluid/non-fluid, serving sizes, pack sizes)
2. Pack size tiers (higher/lower, 3-tier max, base unit)
3. Missing Costing alert + cost calculation
4. Nutrient Info (required fields, Missing Value checkbox)
5. Allergen Info + Custom Allergens configuration
6. Direct Menu Item / Menu Info (Menu Item Name, POS E
